title: WGS chr22 annotation (real VCF -> duckhts -> chunked VEP /region -> ClinVar -> rare/high-impact)
description: The two-pillar flagship on REAL data: a whole-genome VCF chromosome read by duckhts (htslib region read via the .tbi index), annotated against Ensembl VEP's batch /region endpoint in CHUNKS via ducknng's async HTTP client (the host-side launch->drain->retry loop, src/duckdb/ncurl-fanout.ts), joined to a real ClinVar VCF, then filtered rare + high-impact (the rhi flagship) in SQL. The data sources are declared here as duckhts.read_bcf resources; the chunked annotation + filter live in live.mjs (the fanout loop is the one piece that is host code, because the IO table functions can't express a per-chunk retried loop in one SELECT). Point the paths at your own bgzipped+indexed VCF (GRCh38) and a ClinVar VCF.

resolvers.title: DuckHTS read_bcf
resolvers.description: Read an HTS file (VCF/BCF) region into a tidy table via htslib.
